code:
import io
import string

fn byte_of(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Int
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
end

fn parse_or_zero(_ s: String) -> Int
  match string.parse_int(s)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
end

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13 or b == 10
end

fn process(_ line: String) -> Unit
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  mut out = ""
  mut has_prev = false
  mut prev = 0
  mut first = true
  mut token = ""
  while i < n
    let b = byte_of(line, i)
    if is_ws(b)
      if not string.is_empty(token)
        let v = parse_or_zero(token)
        if not has_prev or v != prev
          if first
            out = "#{v}"
            first = false
          else
            out = "#{out} #{v}"
          end
          prev = v
          has_prev = true
        end
        token = ""
      end
    else
      token = "#{token}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not string.is_empty(token)
    let v = parse_or_zero(token)
    if not has_prev or v != prev
      if first
        out = "#{v}"
      else
        out = "#{out} #{v}"
      end
    end
  end
  println(out)
end

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    process(line)
  when None
    println("")
  end
end
